fields.description: After removal (7d1b-802b) completes and validate.sh --ci passes, delete tests/scripts/test-tdd-workflow-removal.sh. The test was created as a RED gate to verify complete removal — once removal is confirmed GREEN, the test has served its purpose and should be deleted. No regression guard is needed for a removed skill. Also remove any .test-index entry for this test file.
fields.title: GREEN cleanup: delete RED test after removal is verified
